title: Dry-run with check mode and diff
description: Preview changes with --check and --diff before applying, especially against shared hosts.
body: Use when a playbook will touch hosts you cannot freely break. Do not apply a play blind — run it with --check and --diff first to see which tasks would change and how. Actions: run check mode, read the diff for each would-change task, confirm the set matches intent, then apply; ensure tasks support check mode so the preview is accurate. Validation signals include the diff showing only the intended changes and no surprise tasks reporting would-change. Risk boundary: some modules cannot honor check mode and may understate impact — for production inventory, require a human gate before the real apply.
